products.name: Ain Dubai Ferris wheel
products.description:
At the heart of Bluewaters Island stands Ain Dubai, the world’s tallest and largest observation wheel, soaring to a breathtaking height of 250 meters. Since its inauguration in October 2021, this architectural marvel has redefined the city’s skyline, offering an unparalleled vantage point to witness the shimmering Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s iconic landmarks. More than just a ride, Ain Dubai is a premium lifestyle destination, seamlessly blending entertainment, luxury, and panoramic wonder. Whether you’re seeking a romantic sunset moment or a vibrant social celebration in the sky, the experience is designed to captivate all the senses.


  • Experience Highlights:Record-Breaking Stature: Stands at 250 meters, officially recognized as the globe’s highest observation wheel.
  • 360-Degree Vistas: Unobstructed views stretching from the Dubai Marina skyline to the Palm Jumeirah and the open sea.
  • Premium Cabins: Choose from spacious observation cabins, perfect for family outings, or indulge in private luxury cabins with bespoke beverage and dining packages.
  • Year-Round Destination: Fully air-conditioned, climate-controlled environments ensure a perfect experience in every season, day or night.
  • Unforgettable Events: A unique venue for private parties, corporate gatherings, and exclusive celebrations suspended above the city.
products.short_description: Ain Dubai is a giant Ferris wheel located at Bluewaters Island in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. It is the world's tallest observation wheel, at a height of 250 m, since October 2021
